untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) tracking consecutive bars at extremes across multiple timeframes, (2) lower-timeframe divergence confirmation (not available as single indicator), (3) bar midpoint calculations not in allowed indicators. Core mechanics of exhaustion detection via bar positioning relative to midpoints and multi-bar extreme tracking cannot be fully expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated using pivot-based extremes and body_pct (small body = potential exhaustion). Close relative to pivot acts as proxy for bar midpoint position. Unable to implement: consecutive bar counting logic, lower-timeframe divergence detection, or precise bar midpoint tracking. Signal is fundamentally about multi-timeframe structure and would require custom calculation functions.
